title: Homestead
description: Welcome to Homestead, a hand-crafted world brimming with quests to embark on, vibrant landscapes and endless building possibilities. Settle in, explore, and create the cozy life you've always dreamed of!
body:
![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Homestead/BH_Homestead_header.webp) #
The Official Homestead Modpack
![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b22205d972d2006c6bd3ff913524a33f8a5761e.png)

![Videos](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Homestead/BH_Homestead_videos.webp)
![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b22205d972d2006c6bd3ff913524a33f8a5761e.png)
![Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Homestead/BH_Homestead_features.webp) ### 🌎 A Rich, Handcrafted World: - Custom World Generation with lush forests, sprawling fields, rugged mountains, and serene rivers thanks to mods like [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic) and [Geophilic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/geophilic) - Hand-placed Structures and procedural ruins blending into the landscape with the help of mods like [Repurposed Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-fabric) and all of the mods by [YUNG](https://modrinth.com/user/YUNGNICKYOUNG) - Biome Diversity using enhanced terrain mods without losing the cozy, Vanilla+ feeling like [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit) and [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone) ### 📖 Guided Yet Free Gameplay: - Extensive Questbook that rewards exploration, creativity, and survival mastery - Chapters Organized Around Themes (homesteading, wild exploration, deep mining, magical secrets) - No Forced Path — explore at your own pace, in your own way ### 🎨 Built-in Shaders for the Ultimate Cinematic Experience: Homestead comes bundled with beautiful shaders already installed — no extra downloads needed! - [Complimentary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) — with 3 presets: Low, Mid, and Extreme - [Nostalgia Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/nostalgia-shader) — for a soft, dreamy atmosphere - [MakeUp - UltraFast](https://modrinth.com/shader/makeup-ultra-fast-shaders) — lightweight and highly customizable - [Potato Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/potato-shaders) — perfect for lower-end PCs - [Super Duper Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/shader/super-duper-vanilla) — beautiful lighting with a classic Minecraft look ### 🛠️ Expanded Survival Experience: - New Tools and Armors made from custom gems like Ruby, Topaz, Peridot, Sapphire, Jade, Aquamarine, and Ametrine thanks to the [Mythic Upgrades](https://modrinth.com/mod/mythic-upgrades) mod - Custom Crafting Recipes and rebalanced Vanilla progression for a slower, rewarding survival - More Realistic Farming with crops, trees, and livestock enhancements with mods like [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) and the [Let's Do Mods](https://modrinth.com/collection/qKHEyt1l/mods) ### 🐾 New Wildlife and Creatures: - Custom Mobs like **Mushlings** and **Fernlings** — friendly companions you can tame and adventure with from our Custom Homestead Mod - Unique Mounts and Rideable Creatures integrated naturally into the world - Mob Variants and Mini-Bosses lurking in caves, forests, and hidden groves ### 🧭 Exploration and Adventure: - Ancient Structures, ruins, shrines, and secrets scattered across the land - Treasure Hunts and Rare Artifacts like the **Golden Leaf** that grant special powers - Mystical Biomes housing rare creatures, magical plants, and powerful relics ### 🏡 Cozy Building and Homesteading: - Hundreds of Building Blocks including wood types, stones, shingles, beams, and cozy decor thanks to mods like [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped) and [Twigs](https://modrinth.com/mod/twigs) - Furniture, Lighting, and Decorative Mods to build your perfect cottage, castle, or cabin thank to mods like [Cluttered](https://modrinth.com/mod/cluttered) and [Beautify: Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/beautify-refabricated) - Advanced Storage Solutions (chests, crates, backpacks, and more!) thanks to mods like [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks) and [Iron Chests: Restocked](https://modrinth.com/mod/ironchests) ### ⚙️ Mechanical and Magical Enhancements: - Vanilla-style Automation with [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) mod enhancements tailored to Homestead - Optional Tech that's balanced to fit the rustic atmosphere (no high-tech clutter) such as [Tom's Simple Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage) and [Wireless Redstone](https://modrinth.com/mod/wirelessredstone) ### 🧡 A Labor of Love: - Over 4 months of development, hand-tuning every system to create a warm, inviting survival experience - Perfect for solo adventurers, small friend groups, or community servers alike
![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b22205d972d2006c6bd3ff913524a33f8a5761e.png)
##
Check out the wiki for more information and to track issues or bugs that you may find!

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b22205d972d2006c6bd3ff913524a33f8a5761e.png)
## 💞 Special Thank You's ### Thank you to everyone who beta tested the pack, finding all the bugs and issues that we could. - [Meleon](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIaVT7Cm0ilw9Rjd8i0J-7g) (Secondary Dev) - [Xodk](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCH4IkMCZ92_OHgeNM9imstA) - [Army](https://www.twitch.tv/valusdagon) - [Lyn](https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561199141628758) - [Alexelle](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCYHsM506gBSsBxejoOTJTrA) - Nylon - [Gonzo](https://www.twitch.tv/gonzozeroone) - [Cobra](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCaTjVD_qZHOVspTK_cVsX8g) - [Mama Native](https://www.twitch.tv/mama_native) - [Snowylasvegas](https://www.twitch.tv/snowylasvegasttv) - Wistericle - [Yuki](https://www.twitch.tv/kawatsuki15) - [Navinor](https://navinor.carrd.co) - [Salad](https://modrinth.com/user/SodaSyrup) (Backend Dev) ### Thank you to the mod developers who helped us with coding our very own mod and bringing to life our crazy ideas. - [Javivi](https://javivi.dev) (Developer) - [Raboy](https://www.fiverr.com/raboy13) (Animator) - [Flash](https://www.fiverr.com/fflash_) (Model/Texture) - [Bret06](https://modrinth.com/organization/LunarEclipseStudios) (Developer) - [Artmanoil](https://vgen.co/artmanoil) (Custom GUI/TexturePack Guy) - [Gigoe](https://gigoe.shop) (Main Menu/Loading Screen Artist) ### And thank you to [Slugv](https://www.fiverr.com/n3aal_) for making the best logo and icon for this beautiful modpack. This could not have come to life more without you.
![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b22205d972d2006c6bd3ff913524a33f8a5761e.png)
